blockingIssues.title: ToastContainer still uses inline SVGs instead of LucideIcon
blockingIssues.description: ToastContainer.astro defines typeIcons in frontmatter using LucideIcon but the actual renderToasts() function in the script block uses raw inline SVGs (lines 35-38). The spec requires AC-US1-03: all toasts must use Lucide icons (CheckCircle, XCircle, Info, AlertTriangle).
blockingIssues.evidence: typeIcons: Record<ToastType, string> = { success: `<svg...>`, error: `<svg...>`, info: `<svg...>`, warning: `<svg...>` }
blockingIssues.fix: Replace inline SVGs with LucideIcon component rendering in the toast template

blockingIssues.title: 26+ files still use inline SVGs instead of LucideIcon component
blockingIssues.description: Per AC-US1-05 and AC-US1-06, the goal is to replace ALL inline SVGs with consistent Lucide icons. Major violators include AdminLayout.astro (18+ inline SVGs), businesses/index.astro (5+ inline SVGs), about.astro (4 inline SVGs).
blockingIssues.location: src/layouts/AdminLayout.astro, src/pages/businesses/index.astro, src/pages/about.astro, and 25+ more files
blockingIssues.fix: Systematically replace inline SVGs with LucideIcon component across all files

blockingIssues.title: MotionAnimations.astro missing explicit prefers-reduced-motion check
blockingIssues.description: Motion.js library respects prefers-reduced-motion by default, BUT globals.css line 139-147 sets animation-duration: 0.01ms which conflicts with Motion animations. The code doesn't have explicit guards before starting animations.
blockingIssues.fix: Add explicit prefers-reduced-motion check before calling animate() in DOMContentLoaded handlers

warnings.title: LucideIcon strokeWidth prop not propagated to icons
warnings.description: LucideIcon.astro accepts strokeWidth prop but doesn't pass it to the Icon component. All icons use default stroke-width.
warnings.fix: Pass strokeWidth prop to Icon component: <Icon size={size} class={className} strokeWidth={strokeWidth} />

warnings.title: Footer social links touch target too small
warnings.description: Footer.astro social links use LucideIcon with size={16} (w-4 h-4 = 16px). WCAG requires minimum 44x44px touch targets. The parent <a> needs min-height: 44px or explicit touch sizing.
warnings.fix: Add min-h-[44px] min-w-[44px] or increase link padding to meet touch target requirements

warnings.title: LucideIcon imports all icons via '* as LucideIcons'
warnings.description: LucideIcon.astro uses 'import * as LucideIcons from @lucide/astro' which imports ALL Lucide icons. This increases bundle size. Consider importing only needed icons.
warnings.fix: Use named imports: import { Sun, Moon, ChevronDown, etc. } from '@lucide/astro'

warnings.title: motion-utils.ts duplicates MotionAnimations.astro functions
warnings.description: Both src/lib/motion-utils.ts and src/components/ui/MotionAnimations.astro contain animation utility functions. This duplication may cause maintenance issues.
warnings.fix: Consolidate to single source of truth, import from one location

warnings.title: Text reveal animation may cause layout shift
warnings.description: textReveal() in MotionAnimations.astro manipulates innerHTML and creates <span> wrappers for each word. This happens synchronously during DOMContentLoaded which may cause FOUC or layout shift on slower devices.
warnings.fix: Consider applying opacity: 0 initially via CSS, only animate in after fonts load

icons-render-light-dark.notes: LucideIcon uses currentColor stroke, which adapts to text color in both themes. However, ToastContainer still uses hardcoded inline SVGs that may not respect theme.

animations-respect-reduced-motion.notes: No explicit JavaScript check for prefers-reduced-motion before calling animate(). CSS global rule may conflict with Motion.js.

no-visual-jank.notes: CSS transitions use transform/opacity which are GPU-accelerated. will-change applied to animated elements.

touch-targets-44px.notes: Most interactive elements meet 44px requirement (Button h-11, mobile menu items min-h-[44px], ThemeToggle h-10 w-10 = 40px). Footer social links at 16px fail.

focus-states-visible.notes: All buttons/links have focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring classes. Proper focus indicators throughout.

recommendations: Priority 1: Fix ToastContainer to use LucideIcon (spec blocker)
Priority 2: Add prefers-reduced-motion guard in animation initialization
Priority 3: Increase Footer social link touch targets to 44px
Priority 4: Replace remaining inline SVGs with LucideIcon across Admin pages and list pages
Priority 5: Optimize LucideIcon bundle with named imports instead of wildcard
